Package org.apache.bookkeeper.bookie

Class BookieStateManager

java.lang.Object
org.apache.bookkeeper.bookie.BookieStateManager
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable, StateManager
@StatsDoc(name="bookie", category="server", help="Bookie state manager related stats") public class BookieStateManager extends Object implements StateManager
An implementation of StateManager.
